title: dryopteris aemula
intro: Dryopteris aemula, also known as the Rough Buckler Fern, is a species of fern native to eastern Australia and New Zealand. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris aemula include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Dryopteris aemula include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make extracts or added to skincare products for its purported benefits.
